name: okx-plugin-store
description: Official and community plugins for OKX Plugin Store.

plugins.name: aave-v3-plugin
plugins.description: Lend and borrow crypto assets on Aave V3 — the leading decentralized liquidity protocol. Trigger phrases: supply to aave, deposit to aave, borrow from aave, repay aave loan, aave health factor, my aave positions, aave interest rates, enable emode, disable collateral, claim aave rewards.

plugins.name: clanker-plugin
plugins.description: Deploy and manage Clanker ERC-20 tokens on Base and Arbitrum — launch tokens, search by creator, and claim LP fee rewards

plugins.name: compound-v3-plugin
plugins.description: Compound V3 (Comet) lending plugin: supply collateral, borrow/repay the base asset, and claim COMP rewards

plugins.name: gmx-v2-plugin

plugins.description: Trade perpetuals on Hyperliquid — check positions, get prices, place market/limit orders with TP/SL brackets, close positions, deposit USDC

plugins.name: macro-intelligence

plugins.name: meme-trench-scanner
plugins.description: Meme Trench Scanner v1.0 — Solana Meme automated trading bot with 11 Launchpad coverage, 7-layer exit system, TraderSoul AI observation

plugins.name: meteora-plugin
plugins.description: Meteora DLMM plugin for searching pools, getting swap quotes, checking positions, executing swaps, and adding liquidity on Solana

plugins.name: okx-buildx-hackathon-agent-track

plugins.name: pancakeswap-clmm-plugin
plugins.description: PancakeSwap V3 CLMM farming plugin — stake LP NFTs into MasterChefV3, harvest CAKE rewards, collect swap fees. Trigger phrases: stake LP NFT, farm CAKE, collect fees, unfarm, PancakeSwap farming.

plugins.name: pancakeswap-v2-plugin
plugins.description: Swap tokens and manage liquidity on PancakeSwap V2 (xyk AMM) on BSC, Base, and Arbitrum. Triggers: swap pancakeswap v2, add/remove liquidity pancake, pcs v2 quote, check pancake pair.

plugins.description: Swap tokens and manage concentrated liquidity on PancakeSwap V3 on BNB Chain, Base, and Arbitrum
